overview.description:
In the process of data collection by an interviewer, a summary of the questionnaire’s roundabout is displayed in the interviewer app to help the interviewer better organize their work.
 
 In this summary, the information displayed is common to all surveys, but the calculation rules must be defined in Pogues.

error.formulaNotVtl: Roundabout summary is available only to questionnaires in VTL
error.roundaboutNotFound: Roundabout summary is available only to questionnaires with a roundabout

overview.versionNoArticulation: Roundabout summary has not been specified in this version.
